app.title: Upriv
vault.name.label: Vault name
vault.name.invalid_chars: Name cannot contain \ / : * ? " < > | or control characters.
vault.name.trailing: Name cannot end with a space or period.
vault.name.reserved: This name is reserved by the operating system.
vault.order.label: Display order
vault.order.help: Lower numbers appear first in the vault list.

vault.export.invalid_filename: This filename cannot be saved on this system.
vault.import.title: Import archive
vault.import.rename_prompt: The file name contains characters that cannot be used as a vault name. Choose a display name:
vault.create.title: New vault
vault.create.password_hint_help: A short reminder for you — do not repeat the password here.
vault.create.note_help: Short annotation for this vault (max {max} characters).
vault.change_password.title: Change password
close.dialog.title: Close vault
close.dialog.close_hint: Keeps encrypted cache on disk for faster reopen.
close.dialog.seal_confirm: Only the .7z file will remain. Encrypted cache on disk will be erased.
modal.backup.title: Backups
modal.backup.delete_confirm: Type the vault name to confirm deletion:
modal.settings.title: Vault settings
modal.settings.delete_confirm: Type the vault name to confirm:
unlock.title: Unlock vault
recovery.title: Recovery required
warning.vault_open_on_exit: A vault is still open. Close it before exiting?
warning.external_editor: External apps may copy files outside the vault (temp folders).
warning.plain_mode: Plain mode stores decrypted files on disk until close. Not recommended.
warning.password_change_backups: Existing backups will keep the old password. Only the main archive and new backups will use the new password.
warning.auto_close_soon: Vault will close in {seconds} s due to inactivity.
error.sync_mismatch: Archive and encrypted store are out of sync
empty.workspace_closed: Unlock a vault to access files
